face_description: Describe yourself in detail so Gemini can match you. Example: young asian man, round youthful face, dark bowl-cut hair, round black wire-frame glasses, clean-shaven, early twenties. Another example: middle-aged white man with short brown beard, short brown hair, dark brown eyes, in his 30s.
channel_description: Optional: what your channel is about. Used to hint the script at relevant whiteboard content.
